docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,600.00 FILED BY ZHAO, IVY AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLAND RESIDENTIAL LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-10-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLAND RESIDENTIAL LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-17-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF IVY ZHAO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HOLLAND RESIDENTIAL LLC IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF IVY ZHAO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HOLLAND RESIDENTIAL LLC IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHAO, IVY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLLAND RESIDENTIAL LLC $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
